scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c blue,green "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && uv run python -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 18000 --reload
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace frontend && cd backend && uv run python -m ruff check . && uv run python -m mypy app
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace frontend && cd backend && uv run python -m mypy app
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run build && cd backend && uv run pytest
